label: Beta 1.5.7
notes: Beta 1.5.7 — Connector gets per-clip speed fidelity: a clip's constant speed now travels between Premiere and Resolve (and variable speed ramps are detected and clearly flagged instead of silently dropped). The Connector panel is rebuilt premium in Edithive blue — a live transfer report with a relink progress bar, a status checklist, and Sequence/Footage/Music/Others filing, plus a per-project Recent-transfers log you can clear. On import, everything files into a master bin named 'Edithive Connector_<project>' with those sub-folders, in both Premiere and Resolve. Fixes: the Asset Library shows document previews again (PDF/Office/PSD thumbnails were coming up blank), and the music waveform in the Premiere & Resolve panels no longer flickers on and off. Carries everything from 1.5.6.
